summary: Tested 3 features: Homeschool Parent Portal, Report Card Generation, and Template of the Week. All backend tests passed (15/15). Fixed ReportCards.js API endpoint bug. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features tested and working: 1) Homeschool Parent Portal - token generation and public portal page work correctly, 2) Report Cards - class/student selection and report generation work after fixing /api/school to /api/schools endpoint, 3) Template of Week - Dashboard shows weekly template and navigation to LessonPlanner works with template pre-loaded.

homeschool_portal.GET /api/homeschool-portal/{token}: PASS - returns student progress without auth
homeschool_portal.Frontend HomeschoolPortal page: PASS - displays student name, stats, subjects, achievements
homeschool_portal.Share with Parent button: PASS - generates and displays portal link with copy button

report_cards.Generate Report Card: PASS - generates preview with student info, grades, attendance

template_of_week.GET /api/ai/templates/weekly: PASS - returns weekly template with Spanish translations
template_of_week.Dashboard card: PASS - shows 'Plantilla de la Semana' with template info
template_of_week.Usar esta plantilla button: PASS - navigates to LessonPlanner with template loaded

bug_fixed.fix: Changed to /api/schools and extract first school from array response
